name: Chinese Squid Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach squid rings and tentacles in boiling water for 30 seconds.
2. Drain and set aside to cool.
3. Saute garlic in frying pan over low heat using 1 tablespoon of oil until lightly browned.
4. Combine squid, garlic, the egg yolk, and the rest of the dry ingredients in a food processor.
5. Add 1 or 2 tablespoons of oil as you go while processing.
6. Stop when the mixture forms a large ball.
7. Remove from the processor and form into a dozen or so balls.
8. Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a heavy frying pan until hot.
9. When hot, add squid balls and brown lightly on all sides.
10. Turn down the heat, add stock, and cover.
11. Simmer for five minutes.
12. Serve on toothpicks with soy sauce or use as fishballs in soup.
